objects.description: [ROAMINGHOUSE](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9026) can change its execution method to create a batch file in the startup folder that executes a legitimate executable if a McAfee product is detected.(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha Updates APR 2025)
